description: Full-stack developer working with MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js. Responsible for building and maintaining web applications across the entire stack.
day_to_day: Morning standup with the team to discuss progress and blockers
Working on feature development across the stack (React frontend, Node.js/Express backend)
Code reviews for team members' pull requests
Debugging production issues reported by the QA team
Collaborating with designers on UI/UX implementations
Participating in sprint planning and retrospectives
common_issues: JWT token expiration and refresh flow
React state management with complex forms
CORS configuration in development vs production
File upload size limits and storage optimization
industry_standards: Code review process with at least one approval

company_types.expectations: Full-stack generalist, fast-paced, own features end-to-end
Specialized in frontend or backend, cross-team collaboration
